name: Easy Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Lemon or Butternut Flavoring (or all vanilla)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and margarine until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture, mixing until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a tube pan.
6. Place the pan in a cold oven.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes at 350°F.
8. Turn off the heat and allow the cake to cool in the pan before removing it.
